entries.source: "What should I be careful not to romanticize?"
entries.value: "Apa yang perlu saya berhati-hati supaya tidak meromantikkannya?"

entries.source: "What were your real options at this moment?"
entries.value: "Apakah pilihan sebenar anda pada saat ini?"

entries.source: "What would people in your time assume that modern readers might miss?"
entries.value: "Apakah andaian orang pada zaman anda yang mungkin terlepas pandang oleh pembaca moden?"

entries.source: "What would your critics say about your choices?"
entries.value: "Apa yang akan dikatakan pengkritik anda tentang pilihan anda?"

entries.source: "Which parts of your story are well documented?"
entries.value: "Bahagian mana dalam kisah anda yang didokumenkan dengan baik?"

entries.source: a critic;
entries.value: a pengkritik;

entries.source: a modern historian;
entries.value: seorang ahli sejarah moden;

entries.source: a primary source excerpt to evaluate.
entries.value: a primary source excerpt to nilai.

entries.source: a rival;
entries.value: seorang pesaing;

entries.source: A useful historical AI response should have two layers.
entries.value: Berguna historical AI response patut mempunyai two layers.

entries.source: AI historical conversation can help when it is handled carefully.
entries.value: AI historical conversation boleh bantu apabila ia ialah handled carefully.

entries.source: AI roleplay
entries.value: AI lakonan peranan

entries.source: an ordinary person affected by the decision;
entries.value: orang biasa yang terkesan oleh keputusan itu;

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: Tanya AI untuk label uncertainty.

entries.source: Character voice plus evidence notes
entries.value: Suara watak serta nota bukti

entries.source: Continue the route
entries.value: Teruskan laluan

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Dates dan summaries matter, tetapi pelajar often memerlukan way menjadi human situation: apa orang believed, apa choices mereka saw, apa limits shaped mereka, dan apa mereka tidak dapat mempunyai known.

entries.source: For example, a learner studying democracy might talk with Ambedkar, then ask Source Critic to evaluate a speech or constitutional passage. A learner studying a city can start with Geography Explorer to understand place, then move into historical conversation.
entries.value: Untuk contoh, pelajar belajar democracy mungkin talk dengan Ambedkar, then tanya Pengkritik Sumber untuk nilai speech atau constitutional passage. pelajar belajar city boleh mula dengan Penjelajah Geografi untuk fahami place, then move menjadi historical conversation.

entries.source: Good guardrails for students
entries.value: Pengadang yang baik untuk pelajar

entries.source: Historical roleplay can make context, choices, and ideas easier to remember when it separates imagination from evidence.
entries.value: Lakonan peranan sejarah boleh jadikan context, choices, dan ideas lebih mudah untuk ingat apabila ia separates imagination daripada bukti.

entries.source: Historical roleplay is especially powerful when learners compare perspectives. After speaking with one figure, ask for another point of view:
entries.value: Lakonan peranan sejarah amat berkesan apabila pelajar membandingkan perspektif. Selepas bercakap dengan seorang tokoh, minta sudut pandang lain:

entries.source: History becomes more memorable without pretending uncertainty has disappeared.
entries.value: History becomes more memorable tanpa pretending uncertainty mempunyai disappeared.

entries.source: History is easier to remember when it feels inhabited.
entries.value: History ialah lebih mudah untuk ingat apabila ia feels inhabited.

entries.source: Learning history by talking to historical figures with AI
entries.value: Pembelajaran history oleh talking untuk tokoh sejarah dengan AI

entries.source: Separate in-character claims from evidence notes.
entries.value: Separate dalam-character dakwaan daripada nota bukti.

entries.source: Start with Talk to a Historical Person for a figure-led conversation. Use Time Travel for a place-and-period expedition. Read the Talk to a Historical Person guide or the Time Travel prompts and study loop if you want a more structured workflow.
entries.value: Mula dengan Berbicara Dengan Tokoh Sejarah untuk figure-led conversation. Use Jelajah Masa untuk place-dan-period expedition. Baca Berbicara Dengan Tokoh Sejarah panduan atau Jelajah Masa prompt dan gelung belajar jika anda want more structured aliran kerja.

entries.source: Talking to a historical figure is not magic access to the past. It is a learning format.
entries.value: Talking untuk tokoh sejarah bukan magic access untuk past. Ia ialah pembelajaran format.

entries.source: That combination is more useful than either layer alone. A plain encyclopedia summary can be forgettable. Pure roleplay can be misleading. Voice plus evidence creates a better learning surface.
entries.value: Itu combination ialah more berguna than either layer alone. plain encyclopedia summary boleh menjadi forgettable. Pure lakonan peranan boleh menjadi misleading. Voice plus bukti creates lebih baik pembelajaran surface.

entries.source: That is how inspir approaches historical conversation: a persona card, an in-character reply, and context notes that keep imagination connected to evidence.
entries.value: Itu ialah bagaimana inspir approaches historical conversation: persona card, dalam-character reply, dan context notes itu keep imagination connected untuk bukti.

entries.source: That kind of questioning turns history from a list into a context.
entries.value: Jenis penyoalan itu menukar sejarah daripada senarai kepada konteks.

entries.source: The AI should separate character from evidence. It can answer in a historically grounded voice, but it should also add notes when records are incomplete, interpretations differ, or the response is a reconstruction.
entries.value: AI patut separate character daripada bukti. Ia boleh jawapan dalam historically grounded voice, tetapi ia patut also add notes apabila records ialah incomplete, interpretations differ, atau response ialah reconstruction.

entries.source: The first layer is the roleplay. It can speak in an accessible voice, explain motives, and make the situation vivid. This is the part that helps memory.
entries.value: Pertama layer ialah lakonan peranan. Ia boleh speak dalam accessible voice, jelaskan motives, dan jadikan situation vivid. Ini ialah part itu membantu memory.

entries.source: The format works because it lets learners ask questions such as:
entries.value: Format ini berkesan kerana membolehkan pelajar bertanya soalan seperti:

entries.source: The goal is not to make the AI the authority. The goal is to make learners ask better historical questions.
entries.value: Goal bukan untuk jadikan AI authority. goal ialah untuk jadikan pelajar tanya lebih baik historical soalan.

entries.source: The promise is not that AI can summon the past. It cannot. The promise is that roleplay can make context easier to question, compare, and remember when the experience is clearly separated from evidence.
entries.value: Promise bukan itu AI boleh summon past. Ia tidak boleh. promise ialah itu lakonan peranan boleh jadikan context lebih mudah untuk soalan, bandingkan, dan ingat apabila experience ialah clearly separated daripada bukti.

entries.source: The safety rule
entries.value: Peraturan keselamatan

entries.source: The second layer is the evidence note. It should say when something is directly documented, widely interpreted, disputed, or reconstructed for learning. This is the part that protects accuracy.
entries.value: Second layer ialah bukti note. Ia patut say apabila something ialah directly documented, widely interpreted, disputed, atau reconstructed untuk pembelajaran. Ini ialah part itu protects accuracy.

entries.source: The strongest questions are not trivia questions. They are context questions.
entries.value: Strongest soalan bukan trivia soalan. Mereka ialah context soalan.

entries.source: The useful part of historical roleplay
entries.value: Bahagian berguna dalam lakonan peranan sejarah

entries.source: These questions help the learner see history as a set of pressures and interpretations rather than a costume drama. They also keep the AI honest. The more the learner asks about evidence, limits, and perspective, the less likely the session is to become fantasy wearing a famous name.
entries.value: Soalan-soalan ini membantu pelajar melihat sejarah sebagai rangkaian tekanan dan tafsiran, bukan drama berkostum. Soalan itu juga memastikan AI kekal jujur. Semakin banyak pelajar bertanya tentang bukti, batasan, dan perspektif, semakin kecil kemungkinan sesi berubah menjadi fantasi yang memakai nama terkenal.

entries.source: Try prompts like:
entries.value: Cuba prompt seperti:

entries.source: Use historical AI roleplay with three rules:
entries.value: Gunakan lakonan peranan AI sejarah dengan tiga peraturan:

entries.source: Use it for comparison
entries.value: Gunakannya untuk perbandingan

entries.source: Verify important facts with trusted sources, textbooks, or teacher-provided materials.
entries.value: Verify important facts dengan trusted sources, textbooks, atau teacher-provided materials.

entries.source: What choices were available?
entries.value: Apa choices ialah available?

entries.source: What did their society assume?
entries.value: Apa melakukan mereka society assume?

entries.source: What did this person care about?
entries.value: Apa melakukan ini orang care tentang?

entries.source: What to ask a historical figure
entries.value: Apa yang perlu ditanya kepada tokoh sejarah

entries.source: What would modern readers misunderstand?
entries.value: Apa akan modern readers misunderstand?

entries.source: Which parts are well documented and which parts are uncertain?
entries.value: Bahagian mana ialah well documented dan bahagian mana ialah uncertain?

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Anda boleh try format dalam Berbicara Dengan Tokoh Sejarah. Jika anda want wider scene sebelum meeting orang, use Jelajah Masa untuk visit period, inspect constraints, dan then tanya apa choices orang actually mempunyai.
